title: Slither: reentrancy-eth
description:
Reentrancy in VulnerableVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#23-35):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (src/VulnerableVault.sol#29)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= amount (src/VulnerableVault.sol#32)
	VulnerableVault.balances (src/VulnerableVault.sol#10) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- VulnerableVault.balances (src/VulnerableVault.sol#10)
	- VulnerableVault.deposit() (src/VulnerableVault.sol#17-21)
	- VulnerableVault.getBalance(address) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#37-39)
	- VulnerableVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#23-35)

title: Slither: reentrancy-events
description:
Reentrancy in VulnerableVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#23-35):

	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawn(msg.sender,amount) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#34)

title: Slither: solc-version
description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (src/VulnerableVault.sol#2)

title: Slither: low-level-calls
description:
Low level call in VulnerableVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/VulnerableVault.sol#23-35):
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (src/VulnerableVault.sol#29)
